sessions.objective: RED-TEAM: COPPA/FERPA compliance for EdTech pilot
sessions.note: Previous session — findings preserved, still relevant to mathcrew

sessions.objective: Cold audit of mathcrew codebase for architecture, decomposition, and 3D feasibility

objects.name: MathProblem
objects.description: Math exercise with difficulty, topic, expected answer.

objects.name: ScoreRecord
objects.description: REGULATED DATA: Student ID + problem ID + score + timestamp.

objects.name: LearningSession
objects.description: REGULATED DATA: Session with student ID, start/end time, problems attempted.

objects.name: Classroom
objects.description: Organizational unit linking Teacher to Students.

objects.name: ComputeDifficulty
objects.description: DECIDE: adaptive difficulty from ScoreRecord history.

objects.name: AggregateClassPerformance
objects.description: DECIDE: computes class-level aggregates for teacher dashboard.

objects.name: SubmitAnswer
objects.description: ACT: student submits answer, creates ScoreRecord.

objects.name: MathWorld_Monolith
objects.description: AUDIT FINDING: MathWorld.tsx was a 200-line monolith mixing 6 concerns. DECOMPOSED into Player, FollowCamera, Bridge, constants, MathWorld.

objects.name: DeadDependency_Ecctrl
objects.description: AUDIT FINDING: ecctrl in package.json but never imported. REMOVED.

objects.name: DeadDependency_Leva
objects.description: AUDIT FINDING: leva in package.json but never imported. REMOVED.

objects.name: StaleHandoff
objects.description: AUDIT FINDING: handoff-v0.1 doc describes non-existent features (story/, scenes3d/, Ecctrl). CORRECTED with notice.

objects.name: isUnlocked_Duplication
objects.description: AUDIT FINDING: isUnlocked logic duplicated between core/prerequisite.ts (tested) and MathWorld.tsx (inline, hardcoded IDs). Client should use core/.

objects.name: R3F_Rendering_Stack
objects.description: React Three Fiber 9.5 + Three.js r183 + Rapier 2.2 + Drei 10.7. Confirmed as correct choice for mathcrew's scale (~30 objects).

securityConcerns.concern: COPPA CERTAINLY TRIGGERED: storing student data from children under 13
FERPA LIKELY TRIGGERED: student scores stored by EdTech vendor

governancePolicies.policy: COPPA compliance MUST be verified by legal counsel before deployment
